name: Platform Infra Health Digest
description: Pull live health of the platform data services (PostgreSQL, Redis, Milvus) in parallel via openagentic_admin.admin_system_<svc>_health_check, normalize the per-service native-dict response shapes (Dict[str, Any] -> FastMCP-serialized JSON text via the mcp-proxy content-block joiner), pre-compute per-service status rows + an overall_status flag in a single analyze transform, ask the platform LLM for a 2-3 bullet narrative highlighting any degraded service (or stating 'all healthy' concisely if all are up), strip any chain-of-thought preamble, then render an HTML digest via webhook_response with per-service cards + narrative + raw payloads. Empty-degraded case (all-healthy, the operational default in stable clusters) renders an explicit 'all services healthy' banner instead of an empty alert section.

meta.purpose: Snapshot the platform's core data-service health (PostgreSQL, Redis, Milvus) and produce a single-page operator digest with per-service cards plus an LLM-written degraded-service narrative.
how_it_works: 1. Fans the trigger out to three parallel openagentic_admin.admin_system_<svc>_health_check calls (PostgreSQL, Redis, Milvus).
2. A labeled-merge converges the three native-dict responses keyed by service.
3. A normalize transform unwraps the FastMCP-serialized content blocks, computes per-service status rows, and sets an overall_status flag.
4. The platform LLM writes a 2-3 bullet narrative highlighting any degraded service (or a concise 'all healthy' line).
5. A CoT-stripper transform removes any LLM preamble.
6. webhook_response renders the HTML digest with per-service status cards, narrative, and raw payloads. All-healthy short-circuit shows an explicit banner instead of an empty alert section.
meta.expected_output: HTML digest with: per-service status card (PG/Redis/Milvus), overall_status banner, 2-3 bullet LLM narrative, and raw per-service health JSON for diagnostics.
meta.useful_when: Morning platform-health check before deploys, post-Helm-upgrade verification, or when chat/Flows feels slow and you need 'is Postgres/Redis/Milvus actually OK?' in one shot.

operations.value: {{ (() => { const extract = (text) => { if (!text) return null; let parsed = null; try { parsed = JSON.parse(text); if (parsed && typeof parsed === 'object' && typeof parsed.healthy === 'boolean') return parsed; } catch (e) {} const ri = text.indexOf('"result"'); if (ri !== -1) { let depth = 0; let start = -1; for (let i = ri; i < text.length; i++) { const ch = text[i]; if (ch === '{') { if (depth === 0 && start === -1) start = i; depth++; } else if (ch === '}') { depth--; if (depth === 0 && start !== -1) { const candidate = text.slice(start, i + 1); try { const obj = JSON.parse(candidate); if (obj && typeof obj === 'object' && obj.result && typeof obj.result === 'object') return obj.result; if (obj && typeof obj === 'object' && typeof obj.healthy === 'boolean') return obj; } catch (e) {} start = -1; } } } } const m = text.match(/"healthy"\s*:\s*(true|false)/); if (m) { const msgMatch = text.match(/"message"\s*:\s*"([^"]+)"/); return { healthy: m[1] === 'true', message: msgMatch ? msgMatch[1] : '' }; } return null; }; const parseSvc = (key, displayName) => { const raw = input && input[key]; const text = String((raw && raw.content) || ''); const parsed = extract(text); if (!parsed || typeof parsed !== 'object') { return { name: displayName, status: 'unknown', message: 'no response from openagentic_admin', extras: {} }; } const healthy = parsed.healthy === true; const status = healthy ? 'healthy' : 'unhealthy'; const message = String(parsed.message || (healthy ? 'OK' : 'no message')); const extras = {}; if (typeof parsed.version === 'string') extras.version = parsed.version; if (typeof parsed.table_count === 'number') extras.table_count = parsed.table_count; if (typeof parsed.database_size_mb === 'number') extras.database_size_mb = parsed.database_size_mb; if (parsed.details && typeof parsed.details === 'object') { if (typeof parsed.details.collection_count === 'number') extras.collection_count = parsed.details.collection_count; } return { name: displayName, status: status, message: message, extras: extras }; }; return [parseSvc('postgres_health', 'postgres'), parseSvc('redis_health', 'redis'), parseSvc('milvus_health', 'milvus')]; })() }}
{{ (() => { const arr = Array.isArray(input.per_service) ? input.per_service : []; return arr.filter(s => s && s.status === 'healthy').length; })() }}
{{ (() => { const arr = Array.isArray(input.per_service) ? input.per_service : []; return arr.filter(s => s && s.status !== 'healthy').length; })() }}

{{ (() => { const arr = Array.isArray(input.per_service) ? input.per_service : []; if (arr.length === 0) return 'unknown'; const anyDown = arr.some(s => s && s.status !== 'healthy'); return anyDown ? 'degraded' : 'healthy'; })() }}

{{ (() => { const arr = Array.isArray(input.per_service) ? input.per_service : []; if (arr.length === 0) return 'No service responses captured.'; const esc = s => String(s == null ? '' : s).replace(/&/g, '&').replace(//g, '>'); return arr.map(s => { const name = String(s.name || ''); const status = String(s.status || 'unknown'); const message = String(s.message || ''); const ex = s.extras || {}; const exParts = []; if (ex.version) exParts.push('version=' + String(ex.version).slice(0, 60)); if (typeof ex.table_count === 'number') exParts.push('tables=' + ex.table_count); if (typeof ex.database_size_mb === 'number') exParts.push('size_mb=' + ex.database_size_mb); if (typeof ex.collection_count === 'number') exParts.push('collections=' + ex.collection_count); const extrasText = exParts.length ? ' (' + exParts.join(', ') + ')' : ''; const cls = status === 'healthy' ? 'svc-healthy' : 'svc-degraded'; return `${esc(name)}${esc(status)}${esc(message)}${esc(extrasText)}`; }).join(''); })() }}

{{ (() => { const overall = String(input.overall_status || 'unknown'); const dc = (typeof input.degraded_count === 'number') ? input.degraded_count : 0; const hc = (typeof input.healthy_count === 'number') ? input.healthy_count : 0; if (overall === 'healthy') return '

All ' + hc + ' platform data services are healthy.

'; if (overall === 'degraded') return '

' + dc + ' of ' + (hc + dc) + ' platform data service(s) DEGRADED. See details below.

'; return '

Health status unknown.

'; })() }}
{{ (() => { const arr = Array.isArray(input.per_service) ? input.per_service : []; return arr.map(s => ({ name: s.name, status: s.status, message: s.message, extras: s.extras })); })() }}

data.label: Narrative
data.prompt:
You are an SRE writing a 2-3 bullet operator-facing narrative on the health of the OpenAgentic platform data services (PostgreSQL, Redis, Milvus).

Overall status: {{steps.analyze.overall_status}} ({{steps.analyze.healthy_count}} healthy, {{steps.analyze.degraded_count}} degraded)

Per-service results (JSON array of { name, status, message, extras }):
{{steps.analyze.raw_payloads}}

Output rules (MUST follow):
1. Start the response with a single `-` character — no preamble, no "Here is", no "The user wants", no thinking out loud.
2. 2-3 short bullets, each on its own line, each beginning with `-`.
3. Highlight any degraded service first with its message verbatim and a concrete next-action.
4. If all services are healthy, say so concisely in one bullet and recommend a routine future check in the second.
5. Reference service names verbatim (postgres / redis / milvus).
